content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and HMHomeManager instantiated in App/WallpaperGridView.swift:2,5 with no home-automation UI or feature; app is a wallpaper browser (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt) — may trigger review questions.
Pierre: Apple restricts HomeKit to apps that provide genuine home-automation functionality, and instantiating HMHomeManager triggers a home-data permission prompt with no user benefit here. The view only lists wallpaper categories, so the HomeKit import looks vestigial or misused. Remove the import and HMHomeManager instance, or add a real home-related feature and justify the HomeKit usage.
